# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: web-http
  namespace: web
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: web
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: web-from-ingress-gateway
  namespace: web
spec:
  server:
    name: web-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-gateway
          namespace: ingress
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: web-from-frontend
  namespace: web
spec:
  server:
    name: web-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-http
  namespace: frontend
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: frontend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-from-ingress-gateway
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  server:
    name: frontend-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ingress-gateway
          namespace: ingress
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-orders
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-grpc
  namespace: orders
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: orders
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: grpc
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/2
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-frontend
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: frontend
          namespace: frontend
---

  name: orders-from-payments
  namespace: orders

  server:
    name: orders-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payments
          namespace: payments
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-from-jobs
  namespace: orders
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-grpc
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: jobs
          namespace: ops
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1

  name: payments-http
  namespace: payments
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: payments

  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---

  server:
    name: payments-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: orders

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: users-from-web
  namespace: users
spec:
  server:
    name: users-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: web
          namespace: web
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: audit-http
  namespace: platform
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: audit
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: audit
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: audit-from-all-meshtls
  namespace: platform
spec:
  server:
    name: audit-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      unauthenticatedTLS: false
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: metrics-http
  namespace: platform
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: metrics
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: metrics
  port: http
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: metrics-from-prometheus
  namespace: platform
spec:
  server:
    name: metrics-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: prometheus
          namespace: monitoring
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: admin-http
  namespace: platform
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: admin
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: admin
  port: admin
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: admin-from-ops
  namespace: platform
spec:
  server:
    name: admin-http
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: ops-admin
          namespace: ops
